title: papaver dubium var. hirtellum
intro: Papaver dubium var. hirtellum, also known as the hairy poppy, is a variety of the Oriental poppy (Papaver dubium) native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as pain, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Papaver dubium var. hirtellum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and act as an antiseptic agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
